1735480.name: Voice Visualizer
1735480.description:
The Voice Visualizer allows you to visualize your voice with a personal image. Make your stream come to life without the obligation of a webcam.

Features

  • The image is vibrating to the sound of your voice, to show the viewer that you are talking
  • Personalize your background with several effects and colors...
  • Or make it transparent to save some space or to have a clean layout
  • You can customize how much your voice is affecting this image
  • Create up to three profiles for several situations and adjustments
  • Present your current emotions to your audience with up to six emotes
